---
title: "Numerical Differentiation"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

← [Numerical Methods](../)

Source inspiration: [@mathewsSite].

## Animation Focus

This page will prioritize intuitive animations that show the algorithm behavior step by step.

### Planned animation ideas

- Visual state evolution of the method
- Parameter sensitivity controls
- Convergence and failure side-by-side comparison

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added to explain the core equations and assumptions.

## Worked Example (Planned)

A compact numerical example with intermediate steps will be included.

## Implementation Notes (Planned)

Implementation details, numerical stability notes, and practical pitfalls will be added.

## Legacy Animation Inventory (Stub)

- Legacy module page: [Numerical Differentiation](http://localhost:8000/n2003/NumericalDiffMod.html) (ok)
- Animation links found in module Animations paragraph: 4
- Unique animation portals: 2

### Animation Portals

1. [Numerical Differentiation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/) (ok)
2. [Numerical Differentiation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Animations6.html) (ok)

- Animation item links found: 7

### Animation Items

1. [Derivative.html](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/Derivative.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 2
- http://localhost:8000/gifs/dotbro.gif
- http://localhost:8000/gifs/dotora.gif
2. [Forward Difference Formula of Order](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/ForwardD1f/ForwardDfaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/ForwardD1f/ForwardDfaa.gif
3. [Forward Difference Formula of Order](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/ForwardD2f/ForwardD2faa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/ForwardD2f/ForwardD1faa.gif
4. [Backward Difference Formula of Order](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/BackwardD1f/BackwardDfaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/BackwardD1f/BackwardDfaa.gif
5. [Backward Difference Formula of Order](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/BackwardD2f/BackwardD1faa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/BackwardD2f/BackwardD1faa.gif
6. [Central Difference Formula of Order](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/CentralD2.1f/CentralD1faa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/CentralD2.1f/CentralD1faa.gif
7. [Central Difference Formula of Order](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/CentralD2.2f/CentralDfaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Derivative/CentralD2.2f/CentralDfaa.gif
